intro x y
    fin_cases x <;> fin_cases y <;> rfl
  exact h x y

have h₂ : (a + b) + c = (b + a) + c := by rw [add_comm a b]
  have h₃ : (b + a) + c = b + (a + c) := by rw [add_assoc]
  calc
    a + (b + c) = (a + b) + c := h₁
    _ = (b + a) + c := h₂
    _ = b + (a + c) := h₃
